title: senecio portalesianus
intro: Senecio portalesianus, also known as Portales ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, making it a potential treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio portalesianus include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
